package.name: odometry_filter
package.description: C++ port of the Python OdometryFilter (formerly in sim_supervisor.odometry). Pure-math complementary filter: IMU prediction + motor-RPM correction + kinematic-bicycle yaw cross-check + brake-pressure α scaling. No ROS dependency in the library itself — that lives in the future odometry_filter_node package. Algorithm is identical to the Python reference (validated by gtest fixtures shared with the Python pytest suite). Same code is the basis for the real-car uDV firmware filter; porting now means sim and car run literally the same C++ from day one.
